oak.name: Oak
oak.description: A simple oak tree to start your journey.

pine.name: Pine
pine.description: Evergreen needles thrive through every season.

elm.name: Elm
elm.description: A hardy tree with a broad, welcoming canopy.

birch.name: Birch
birch.description: The bark is almost like paper.

poplar.name: Poplar
poplar.description: Fast-growing and graceful in the summer breeze.

beech.name: Beech
beech.description: Smooth gray bark gives it a timeless look.

spruce.name: Spruce
spruce.description: They stay verdant green throughout the year.

fir.name: Fir
fir.description: Its fresh scent fills forests year-round.

larch.name: Larch
larch.description: One of the few conifers that sheds its needles.

maple.name: Maple
maple.description: A delicious syrup can be made with their help.

walnut.name: Walnut
walnut.description: Produces flavorful nuts beneath a dense canopy.

ash.name: Ash
ash.description: Strong wood has been prized for centuries.

cherry.name: Cherry
cherry.description: Beautiful pink blossoms brighten your growing focus forest.

plum.name: Plum
plum.description: Spring blossoms soon become sweet summer fruit.

peach.name: Peach
peach.description: Soft pink flowers bloom before the fruit arrives.

weeping_elm.name: Weeping Elm
weeping_elm.description: Elegant branches arch gently toward the ground.

alder.name: Alder
alder.description: Thrives beside rivers and enriches the soil.

cedar.name: Cedar
cedar.description: Naturally fragrant and remarkably resistant to decay.

juniper.name: Juniper
juniper.description: A resilient evergreen with fragrant blue berries.

hemlock.name: Hemlock
hemlock.description: Dense foliage creates cool forest shade.

aspen.name: Aspen
aspen.description: Its shimmering leaves dance in the slightest breeze.

rowan.name: Rowan
rowan.description: Bright red berries attract birds every autumn.

sycamore.name: Sycamore
sycamore.description: Its mottled bark makes every trunk unique.

cypress.name: Cypress
cypress.description: Built to thrive where many trees cannot.

ginkgo.name: Ginkgo
ginkgo.description: One of the oldest surviving tree species.

olive.name: Olive
olive.description: A symbol of peace for thousands of years.

dogwood.name: Dogwood
dogwood.description: Small blossoms create a surprisingly stunning display.

hawthorn.name: Hawthorn
hawthorn.description: Small flowers hide among thorny branches.

magnolia.name: Magnolia
magnolia.description: Its massive flowers have bloomed for millions of years.

kapok.name: Kapok
kapok.description: Towering above tropical forests with ease.

silkwood.name: Silkwood
silkwood.description: Its smooth bark catches the afternoon light.

jacaranda.name: Jacaranda
jacaranda.description: Purple blossoms transform streets into colorful carpets.

flame_tree.name: Flame Tree
flame_tree.description: Brilliant red blossoms light up the canopy.

rain_tree.name: Rain Tree
rain_tree.description: Its enormous canopy provides welcome shade.

redwood.name: Redwood
redwood.description: Among the tallest living trees on Earth.

ironwood.name: Ironwood
ironwood.description: Among the hardest and strongest woods known.

red_cedar.name: Red Cedar
red_cedar.description: Rich color and natural durability make it prized.

baobab.name: Baobab
baobab.description: Nicknamed the tree of life for good reason.

dragon_tree.name: Dragon Tree
dragon_tree.description: Its unusual shape looks almost mythical.

monkey_puzzle.name: Monkey Puzzle
monkey_puzzle.description: Its spiky branches look unlike any other tree.

sequoia.name: Sequoia
sequoia.description: A colossal giant worthy of your greatest achievements.

banyan.name: Banyan
banyan.description: A vast network of roots creates living forests.

wollemi_pine.name: Wollemi Pine
wollemi_pine.description: A prehistoric survivor once thought extinct.
